channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: South Korea Builds AI Tax Tracker While Moving To Drop Crypto Tax
item.description: South Korea’s tax authority is spending roughly $2 million to build an artificial intelligence system that hunts down unreported cryptocurrency income — even as lawmakers push to eliminate the very tax that system would help enforce. Related Reading: Crypto C… [Intel]

item.title: SoftBank and AEP plan massive Ohio gas-fired AI data center campus
item.description: America and Japan are joining forces for a huge project in Ohio. A massive gas-fired power plant and an artificial intelligence data center will be built on federal land. This partnership aims to boost US AI capabilities and energy security. The deal involves… [Intel]

item.title: White House releases AI policy framework focused on state regulations, power generation
item.description: The White House today released a policy document with suggestions on how Congress should regulate artificial intelligence. The move is not unexpected. In December, U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order that instructed White House officials to … [Intel]

item.title: The convergence of context: Why Nvidia’s BlueField-4 STX marries the network and storage admin
item.description: For years, the “wall” between storage and networking administrators has been a fixture of the enterprise data center. I spent the early part of my career as a network engineer and the arena of storage was a bit of a black box, and for most companies, that’s s… [Nvidia]

item.title: AI startup Yotta seeks $4 billion valuation ahead of planned IPO
item.description: The Mumbai-based company is aiming to secure roughly $500 million to $600 million in capital and then file its formal listing documents within weeks, according to people familiar with the matter. It plans to raise a similar amount in the public offering.

item.title: Apple Intelligence-Powered Siri May Not Be Ready, But Apple Earns a Billion Dollars From Other AI Apps
item.description: Apple's more personalized, Apple Intelligence-powered Siri may not be ready for prime time, but that hasn't stopped Apple from making plenty from Artificial Intelligence.Read More... [Intel, Apple]

item.title: $80 Billion Gone: What Was Meta’s Metaverse Project That Is Now Shut Down?
item.description: Tech giant Meta has reportedly announced that it is shutting down its metaverse project, which was a dream project of its founder Mark Zuckerberg, who had called it “the next frontier" upon rebranding the social media company from Facebook to Meta in 2021. Fo… [Meta, ServiceNow]

item.title: Trump officials announce 10-gigawatt data center, gas plants for former Ohio uranium site
item.description: The U.S. Department of Energy has announced a public-private partnership with SoftBank and AEP Ohio to develop a massive artificial intelligence data center and power complex at a former uranium enrichment site in southern Ohio. [Intel]
